ux_issues.description: ListChatSessions returns sessions in descending order (most recent first) but the field is named 'lastMessageAt' not 'updatedAt'. The persona spec expected 'updated_at >= created_at' but the field is 'lastMessageAt'. Inconsistency in naming vs proto conventions.
ux_issues.suggestion: Consider documenting the ordering convention (descending by creation time) and ensuring field naming is consistent with the proto style.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: Planning Message A response claimed itinerary items were already added from 'last response', but this was the first message in the planning session. The AI hallucinated a previous itinerary action that didn't happen in this session.
ai_behavior_issues.context: First planning message asked for a rough itinerary for Lisbon and Porto. AI responded: 'It looks like I already added those items to your itinerary in my last response!' -- but no itinerary items were created.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Chat persistence and session management work flawlessly. All messages round-trip correctly through Firestore, sessions are properly isolated, and ListChatSessions/GetChatHistory return accurate data. The only issue is an AI hallucination about having already created itinerary items when none were created in the planning session.
